challenge.explanation:
Marija predlaže da se rezervne kopije prave at the end of each day. Jasno navodi ovu učestalost kao pouzdan način da se sav rad tog dana bezbedno sačuva. Ovakav dnevni raspored obezbeđuje doslednost i smanjuje rizik od gubitka podataka.

Obrati pažnju na njene reči, koje ukazuju na praktično rešenje osmišljeno da uskladi automatsko pravljenje rezervnih kopija sa postojećim tokom rada tima.
challenge.instructions: Pročitajte tekst i odgovorite na pitanje koje se nalazi ispod.

questions.text:
Maria je odlučila da pošalje e-mail Brijanu kako bi razgovarala o specifičnim pitanjima s kojima se tim susreće u vezi sa procedurama rezervne kopije podataka:

Hi Brian,

I wanted to update you on the current status of our data backup procedures. Bob and I were discussing it, and it seems we're doing well with the daily reminders you helped set up. This ensures that our team backs up their work regularly, which is great!

However, Bob raised a point about minimizing human error, and we discussed the possibility of setting up automatic backups. If we automate the process, we can reduce the chances of forgetting, which would be a big win for us.

I suggested we could schedule automatic backups at the end of each day, which seems like a solid approach. Could you let us know if that's possible, or if there's anything else we should consider?

Thanks for your help!

Best,

Maria

Koliko puta Marija predlaže da se automatski kreiraju rezervne kopije?

answers.feedback: Maria otvoreno navodi da radi rezervnu kopiju svakog dana, a ne svake nedelje.
Marija predlaže duplikat kopiju svakog dana, a ne svaki sat.
Maria preporučuje duplikat članak svakog dana, a ne svakog meseca.

challenge.title: Vežba 89
